name: prototype-lane
description: Element 22's Prototype Lane plugin. /vibe lets a Product Owner describe a change in plain language and Claude spins up a sandboxed prototype branch with a live preview within minutes. /package-handoff distills the prototype into a Product Spine and requests engineer validation. The PO never needs to read a Jira ticket. The Four Guarantees (branch-per-idea, synthetic data, ephemeral URLs, sandbox secrets) are enforced by paired house-rule plugins.
